title: hepetis vallisoletana
intro: Hepetis vallisoletana, also known as Spanish Lavender or Vahlia, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Hepetis vallisoletana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
